episodes.title: Welcome & company intro
episodes.objective: Make the new hire feel welcome and understand our mission, values, team and what we build.

episodes.title: Tools & accounts we use
episodes.objective: Show the stack and the accounts to request so the new hire can get set up on day one.

demo_targets.intent: Tour the GitHub org: repos, teams, projects.

episodes.title: Engineering best practices
episodes.objective: Explain how we write and ship code: branching, pull requests, reviews and coding standards.

episodes.title: Create a new project with the company skills
episodes.objective: Walk through bootstrapping a new project the way we do it, using our templates/skills.

demo_targets.intent: Open acme/skills and show how a new project is scaffolded from it.

episodes.title: How we deploy
episodes.objective: Show the real path from a merged PR to production on our cloud, including CI/CD.

demo_targets.intent: Show a deploy running in CI to Vercel (fill the real URL/console).

episodes.title: Where to get help & what's next
episodes.objective: Point the new hire to people, docs and rituals so they know where to turn next.
